title: Pan-Seared Salmon Sushi Roll
description: A fusion dish that combines the flavors of Japanese sushi with the delicate taste of pan-seared salmon.
instructions: Cook sushi rice according to package instructions.
Prepare the filling by seasoning the salmon fillet with sesame seeds and a pinch of salt.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add the vegetable oil.
Add the salmon fillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Prepare the sushi roll by spreading a thin layer of sushi rice onto a sheet of nori.
Place the cooked salmon fillet in the middle of the rice and roll up the sushi using a bamboo mat.
Slice the roll into 8 equal pieces using a sharp knife.
Serve with a drizzle of silky soy sauce and a sprinkle of Japanese rice vinegar.
